title: Control-M Job Late Start Beyond Forecast Window
app: Control-M workload definitions + run metadata via Automation API
spl:
index=cicd sourcetype="controlm:job"
| eval late_start=if(isnotnull(scheduled_time) AND isnotnull(start_time) AND start_time>scheduled_time+forecast_window_sec,1,0)
| where late_start=1 AND status IN ("Running","Wait Host","Wait Resource")
| eval delay_min=round((start_time-scheduled_time)/60,1)
| table job_name, folder, scheduled_time, start_time, delay_min, controlm_server
| sort -delay_min
description: Late starts compress downstream runtimes and breach business deadlines.
value: Quantifies how far jobs slip past forecasted start for capacity planning.
implementation: Populate `forecast_window_sec` from job attributes; default 300s if null.
